extortion.description: Plaintext authentication credentials (usernames/passwords)-(full names, dates of birth, gender)-(addresses, phone numbers, emails)-Employment history and professional skills-CNI-RIB - Relevé d'Identité Bancair - CDD, CDI, temporary missions - spanning multiple years -   Tax documents (Avis d'imposition) -   Social security attestations -   Training certificates -   Work authorization documents and more ....
